desc: End-to-end validation of the float working-space filter pipeline (FCT_WORKING_SPACE_PIPELINE) on real shipping transitions vs GUI GT, frame 12.

Stylized__Color_Panels.note: Colorize->HueSat; REAL improvement from fused HSV in working space (no inter-filter clamp)

conclusion: The working-space pipeline is gate-NEUTRAL-or-BETTER on tested shipping transitions: no regressions, Color_Panels +0.75 dB. The fused HSV/Contrast/Brightness chain preserves headroom the old 8-bit-per-filter path clamped away. Migrated so far: Brightness, Contrast, HSV Adjust (all applyWorking, in-gamut maxΔ=0 vs apply). Gated default-OFF pending the full GUI gate suite (currently disabled); the golden node corpus (1993/0-reg) confirms byte-identity when off.
remaining: The over-1.0 cross-channel clamp (a fully-coupled 3-channel GPU highlight soft-clip) sits on top of this substrate — a bounded Metal tile-readback disasm task.
